proposed_artifacts.content:
## Evidence Map: Anfal's Tenancy/Occupancy Records

### Status: No documents found in current work order

### Recommended Next Steps
1. Search the matter's source repository for any documents containing the name "Anfal" or related to Napier accommodation.
2. Check legal memory index for any prior references to Anfal or the tenancy.
3. If documents are found, ingest them as source materials and re-run this task.

### Authorities Referenced
- Private Housing (Tenancies) (Scotland) Act 2016, schedule 1 (student accommodation exclusion)
- Housing (Scotland) Act 1988, section 12 and schedule 4 (assured tenancy exclusions)
- Housing (Scotland) Act 2001, section 7 (occupancy terms)
- Equality Act 2010, sections 20, 21, 91 (reasonable adjustments and discrimination)

### Note
No citations are provided because no source materials were available to support any factual or legal findings.
proposed_artifacts.title: Evidence Map for Anfal's Tenancy Records

proposed_tasks.instructions: Use the ListMatterSources and SearchLegalMemory tools to locate any source materials or memory entries containing the name 'Anfal' or referring to 'Napier accommodation'. If found, ingest the documents as source materials and re-run task t-004 to extract tenancy details.
